headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Norfolk Southern, Lowers Price Target to $316
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Brian Ossenbeck   maintains Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $331 to $316.

headline: Baird Maintains Neutral on Norfolk Southern, Raises Price Target to $360
summary: Baird  analyst Daniel Moore   maintains Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $330 to $360.
